creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #0)
> Created attachment 173274 [details]
> git.diff
> 
> Since ports r408063 the PERL option (a requirement for GITWEB) is enabled by
> default via the SEND_EMAIL option.  Given that the PERL option is enabled
> anyway, can we enable the GITWEB option by default too?

Doesn't doing so ultimately make the users box less secure _by default_?
I would argue that opening another [potential] hole by default, isn't
the best policy.

because you asked. :)

--Chris
